flashSales.name: UPS 3S 10kVA 400V 3:3
flashSales.description: The UPS 3S 10kVA 400V 3:3 is a robust, three-phase uninterruptible power supply that offers reliable protection for critical systems and applications.
flashSales.fullDescription:
The UPS 3S 10kVA 400V 3:3 is a robust, three-phase uninterruptible power supply that offers reliable protection for critical systems and applications. Designed with double-conversion online technology, it provides seamless power backup with minimal voltage distortion, ensuring the smooth operation of connected equipment. This UPS 3S 10kVA 400V 3:3 is compatible with external batteries, allowing users to customize their runtime based on specific requirements. Compact and versatile, the UPS 3S 10kVA 400V 3:3 is well-suited for demanding environments, including data centers, telecommunications setups, and industrial facilities. Its built-in maintenance bypass simplifies servicing without interrupting the power supply, while the addition of dust filters enhances durability and performance in harsh conditions. The UPS 3S 10kVA 400V 3:3 supports a wide input voltage range, accommodates high overloads, and delivers exceptional efficiency in both standard and challenging operational environments. Environmentally conscious, this product is RoHS compliant, reflecting a commitment to sustainability and minimal environmental impact. The UPS 3S 10kVA 400V 3:3 is engineered for reliability, making it an ideal choice for businesses seeking uninterrupted power protection for critical operations.
    Output Specifications:
      Maximum Configurable Power: 10.0 kWatts / 10.0 kVA. Voltage Distortion: Less than 3% for linear loads. Frequency: 50 Hz or 60 Hz (sync to mains). Load Crest Factor: 3:1. Overload Capacity: 10 minutes at 125% load, 60 seconds at 150% load.
    Input Specifications:
      Voltage Range: 304�477V. Frequency Range: 45�65 Hz. Total Harmonic Distortion: Less than 3% for full load. Power Factor: Greater than 0.99 at full load.
    Physical Dimensions:
      Height: 530 mm. Width: 250 mm. Depth: 700 mm. Net Weight: 36 kg.
    Environmental Features:
      Operating Temperature: 0�40�C. Relative Humidity: 0�95% (non-condensing). Noise Level: 60 dBA at 1 meter. Protection Class: IP20.
    Additional Features:
      Built-in maintenance bypass. Dust filter for enhanced durability. RoHS compliant for environmental sustainability

Authentic Women�s Career Mode: Play as a club or player from the top five women�s leagues. Ultimate Team Enhancements: Build your dream squad with past and present football legends. flashSales.name: Samsung Galaxy A16 glass screen protector
flashSales.description: The Samsung Galaxy A16 glass screen protector is designed to provide superior protection while maintaining touch sensitivity and clarity.
flashSales.fullDescription:
The Samsung Galaxy A16 glass screen protector is designed to provide superior protection while maintaining touch sensitivity and clarity. It features aluminosilicate tempered glass, which offers enhanced scratch resistance and durability. The ultra-thin design ensures a smooth, silky feel, while the anti-fingerprint coating keeps the screen clean.
    Material: Aluminosilicate tempered glass Thickness: 0.33mm Hardness: 9H scratch resistance Features:
      Crystal-clear transparency for vibrant display quality Fingerprint and dirt-resistant coating for a spotless screen Reinforced edges to prevent chipping Bubble-free installation with an easy application kit

flashSales.name: IPMC CREA I540 16GB RAM/512GB SSD
flashSales.description: The AWOW CREA I540 16GB RAM/512GB SSD is designed for students, professionals, and casual users who need a reliable machine for multitasking, video calls, and productivity apps.
flashSales.fullDescription:
The AWOW CREA I540 16GB RAM/512GB SSD is designed for students, professionals, and casual users who need a reliable machine for multitasking, video calls, and productivity apps. Its IPS display offers crisp visuals with wide viewing angles, while the 16GB RAM ensures smooth performance across multiple tabs and software. The 512GB SSD provides fast boot times and ample storage for documents, media, and apps. Its compact form factor and privacy features make it ideal for remote work or school. Whether you're designing flyers, managing your e-commerce backend, or streaming tutorials, this laptop keeps pace with your workflow.
